name: Ma Credit Income Trust
analysis: MA1 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.9900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.9900, stop A$1.9107, target A$2.2279 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
